title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images depicting views from a car's perspective in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. It sets a contextual backdrop showing diverse cityscapes.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide introduces the presentation theme 'A Ride Through China,' suggesting a focus on urban landscapes and changes. It pairs taxi imagery with iconic cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines an investigative approach to understanding local features, development strategies, and their positive impacts. It emphasizes research and analysis.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are associated with their respective development strategies, emphasizing Beijing's technology and tradition integration, Chongqing's sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou's tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide illustrates how taxi drivers perceive city development strategies, highlighting sustainable urban development, tourism growth, and technology integration. It underlines the customization of strategies to local features.
